title: Erasmus+

Erasmus+

Traineeship Visa Transactions

Okan Homepage

International

International Exchange Programs

Erasmus Programme

Outgoing Students

Internship Mobility

Traineeship Visa Transactions

MENU

It is the student's responsibility to get the latest information on visa procedures and to complete the required documents.

You should get all your documents related to the school by making the necessary initiatives from the relevant departments of the universities. The only document that the Erasmus Office will provide is the document stating that you are ERASMUS STUDENT.

All students (including Green Passport) are required to obtain a visa suitable for their activity.

A minimum of 2 months is required for visa procedures.

For a UK visa, a COS number must be obtained by applying to the British Council. Early application is important as this process takes at least 4 weeks.

(Information below)

You can find consular information below to help with visa procedures within the scope of Erasmus Mobility.
